auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
one_time_description: Robinson Huron Treaty Litigation Fund settlement with Federal and Ontario Provincial Government for past compensation arising from obligations under the Robinson Huron Treaty of 1850
economic_notes: Belleville Affordable Housing Limited Partnership proportionately consolidated at 25%. Construction Equipment Co. (Sault) Inc. and 2104298 Ontario Inc. accounted for by modified equity method. Joint Venture with Dexterra mentioned in reserves. OFNLP limited partnership agreement referenced.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - management has not completed assessment. The dominant item in 2024 is the $617,986,777 Robinson Huron Treaty settlement receivable which drove accumulated surplus from ~$46M to ~$669M. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Construction Equipment Co. (Sault) Inc. (50% owned) and 2104298 Ontario Inc. (50% owned). Belleville Affordable Housing Limited Partnership proportionately consolidated at 25%. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants' based in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario. OSR calculation is approximate as Robinson Huron Treaty settlement dominates and is non-recurring. Schedule 2 segment disclosure was cut off before salaries total could be extracted. Prior accumulated surplus shows $46,373,017 in Statement of Operations but $46,373,217 in Note 7 - minor discrepancy in source document.
